products.barcodeExists: A product with this barcode already exists

customers.empty: No customers yet — add your first customer.

sales.refundConfirm: Refund sale "{{saleNumber}}"? This will restore {{count}} item(s) to stock. This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deactivateUser: Deactivate "{{name}}"? They will no longer be able to sign in.
settings.deleteCategory: Delete category "{{name}}"? Products in this category will need to be reassigned.

errors.expiredBatch: This batch expired on {{date}} — it can't be sold. Write it off from the batch detail page.
errors.prescriptionRequired: {{product}} requires a prescription. Link a valid prescription before adding to cart.
errors.networkError: Network error — check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have permission to do that.
